bead.title: bench: delete lane scaffolding
bead.description:
Delete every trace of the lane/recipe/comparison_group/resource_group/lane_alias/profile_inventory machinery now that profile + bench-set + embedded cell metadata covers the same ground.

Files to delete entirely:
- scripts/benchmark/terminalbench-2-1-sweep.yaml (the giant lane manifest)
- cmd/bench/lanes.go
- cmd/bench/lanes_clone.go and any *_test.go for it (search for 'TestLaneClone')
- Any cmd/bench/testdata/ fixtures referencing lanes (search for lane-related yaml fixtures)

Code to delete within surviving files:
- cmd/bench/sweep.go:
  - validateSweepLaneEnvMatch function (around line 910-919) and all callers
  - Lane struct's metadata duplicate fields: FizeauEnv (line 124), ModelFamily, ModelID, QuantLabel, ProviderSurface, Runtime, HardwareLabel, Endpoint (lines ~144-150 area), ResourceGroup
  - All reads of recipes:, lane_aliases:, comparison_groups:, resource_groups:, profile_inventory: blocks
  - Resource-group concurrency wiring (replaced by concurrency-group lookup via profile.concurrency_group)
- cmd/bench/matrix.go:
  - Lane-id handling at the cell-write boundary
  - profile_id-only stamping (replaced by full profile embed in PR 1c)
- cmd/bench/sweep_test.go:
  - All lane-validation and lane-env-match test cases
- CLI surface: drop --phase, --subset, --all-recipes, --staged-recipes, --snapshot, --snapshot-suffix flags

Rewrite fiz-bench sweep (if kept) as a thin profile x bench-set cross-product loop wrapping the ./benchmark shell driver. Process-tree reaping and resume logic that lived in sweep.go migrate to the shell driver.

Strict prerequisite: PRs 1c, 1d, 2, 3 all landed and verified. Parity fixtures in cmd/bench/testdata/plans/ exist and pass.

In-scope files (rough count, ~15-20):
- File deletions: scripts/benchmark/terminalbench-2-1-sweep.yaml; cmd/bench/lanes.go; cmd/bench/lanes_clone.go; related _test.go files
- Code deletions inside: cmd/bench/sweep.go; cmd/bench/matrix.go; cmd/bench/sweep_test.go

Out-of-scope:
- Docs and shell cleanup (PR 5)

Spec: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-15-benchmark-runner-simplification.md section 'PR 4' and 'PR 4b'
bead.acceptance:
1. 'go build ./...' passes.
2. 'go test ./...' passes.
3. 'rg -n "lane_id|validateSweepLaneEnvMatch|FizeauEnv|PROFILE_ALIASES|EXCLUDED_PROFILES|resource_groups|comparison_groups|lane_aliases|profile_inventory" --glob "!.ddx/**" --glob "!docs/research/archive/**" --glob "!benchmark-results/**"' returns zero hits.
4. 'test ! -e scripts/benchmark/terminalbench-2-1-sweep.yaml' exits 0.
5. 'test ! -e cmd/bench/lanes.go' exits 0.
6. './scripts/benchmark/benchmark --profile vidar-ds4 --bench-set tb-2-1-timing-baseline --plan' still works.
